title: A city on the docket: Inside Lavasa’s insolvency
description: “A city is a dream made visible.”The conception of Lavasa was precisely in this spirit. Envisioned as a privately planned hill city in the Western Ghats, it aspired to translate the idea of urban living into reality by combining homes, public spaces and a shared civic life within a self-contained settlement. Inspired by the romances of the Italian town of Portofino, Lavasa represented an experiment in India’s urban imagination, where a private enterprise attempted to build a city and not just a
